title: Logistics API
description: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.

apis.heading: Create Shipment
apis.description: Creates a shipment order for terminals and other accessories. Use this API to initiate an order to ship terminals and other accessories to merchants.

reqParams.name: shippingAddress
reqParams.description: Input the shipping address for the products. If no address is specified, the merchant's address will be used as the default shipping address.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Full name of the receiver for the shipment.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: The first line of the receiver's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: The second line of the receiver's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: The third line of the receiver's address.

reqParams.name: city
reqParams.description: City of the receiver

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code of the receiver, in uppercase.

reqParams.name: postalCode
reqParams.description: Postal code of the receiver.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the receiver in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: Phone number.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the receiver.

reqParams.name: deliveryInstruction
reqParams.description: Delivery instructions for the carrier.

reqParams.name: lineItems
reqParams.description: An array of products to be shipped.

reqParams.name: productId
reqParams.description: The SurfboardProductId of the product or group of products. This is unique to the partner.

reqParams.name: quantity
reqParams.description: Number of products or group of products to be shipped.

reqParams.name: billingPlanId
reqParams.description: Optional billing plan for the product or group of products chosen. If omitted, default plan will be chosen.

reqParams.name: replacementFor
reqParams.description: If this line item is placed as part of a replacement for an existing device, then the terminalId of the original device needs to be specified. We will supply the merchant with a waybill to return the old device. They can reuse the box which the new terminal comes in.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'..

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Order ID for the order.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Get Shipment Status
apis.description: Retrieves the status of the shipment order. Use this API to get the shipment status of ordered terminals and other accessories.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'..

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: orderStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the shipment order for terminals and accessories. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: The order has been successfully placed.
The order has been shipped and is in transit.
The order has been successfully fulfilled and completed.
The order is pending processing due to stock availability.

resParams.name: trackingUrl
resParams.description: The tracking url of the shipment.

resParams.name: deliveryPartner
resParams.description: The partner or carrier responsible for delivering the shipment.

resParams.name: packageDetails
resParams.description: Specifies information about the products included in the shipment.

resParams.name: productId
resParams.description: The SurfboardProductId of the product or group of products. This is unique to the partner

resParams.name: serialNumber
resParams.description: Serial number of the device.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Ship Terminals in Bulk
apis.description: Creates bulk shipment orders for terminals and other accessories to partners. Use this API to initiate orders to ship multiple terminals and accessories in bulk.

reqParams.name: shippingAddress
reqParams.description: Shipping address for the bulk order.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Full name of the receiver for the shipment.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: The first line of the receiver's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine2

reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code of the receiver, in uppercase.

reqParams.name: postalCode
reqParams.description: Postal code of the receiver.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the receiver in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: Phone number.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the receiver.

reqParams.name: deliveryInstruction
reqParams.description: Delivery instructions for the carrier.

reqParams.name: lineItems
reqParams.description: An array of products to be shipped in bulk.

reqParams.name: productId
reqParams.description: The SurfboardProductId of the product or group of products.

reqParams.name: quantity
reqParams.description: Number of products or group of products to be shipped.

reqParams.name: billingPlanId
reqParams.description: Optional billing plan for the product or group of products chosen.

reqParams.name: replacementFor
reqParams.description: If this line item is placed as part of a replacement for an existing device, then the terminalId of the original device needs to be specified.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Order ID for the bulk order.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Partner Orders
apis.description: Retrieves all orders placed by a partner for terminals and accessories. Use this API to get the status and details of all orders under a partner.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of order objects.

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the order.

resParams.name: trackingUrl
resParams.description: The tracking URL of the shipment.

resParams.name: deliveryPartner
resParams.description: The partner or carrier responsible for delivering the shipment.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the order.

resParams.name: packages
resParams.description: Array of package details in the order.

resParams.name: productId
resParams.description: The SurfboardProductId of the product.

resParams.name: serialNumber
resParams.description: Serial number of the device.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Create Return
apis.description: Creates a return request for terminals using the API. This enhanced version allows for more detailed merchant information and multiple return order lines.

reqParams.name: merchantInfo
reqParams.description: Detailed merchant information for the return request.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the merchant.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the merchant.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the merchant in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: Phone number.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: First line of the merchant's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: Second line of the merchant's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: Third line of the merchant's address.

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase.

reqParams.name: postalNumber
reqParams.description: Postal code of the merchant's address.

reqParams.name: city
reqParams.description: City of the merchant's address.

reqParams.name: returnOrderLines
reqParams.description: Array of return order line items.

reqParams.name: serial
reqParams.description: Serial number of the terminal to be returned.

reqParams.name: merchantId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the merchant.

reqParams.name: terminalId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the terminal.

reqParams.name: reasonForReturn
reqParams.description: Reason for the return.

possibleValues.description: The warranty covers issues potentially related to factory defects.
Not using service applies when the merchant voluntarily leaves or their partner ends the partnership.
Non-warranty broken applies when the terminal is damaged due to misuse or accident.
Technical issues apply when the terminal's software malfunctions.
Compatibility issues occur when the terminal doesn't pair with the merchant's POS system.

reqParams.name: stopBilling
reqParams.description: Whether to stop billing for this terminal.

reqParams.name: comment
reqParams.description: Additional comments regarding the return.

reqParams.name: deliveryInstruction
reqParams.description: Delivery instructions for the carrier.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: returnId
resParams.description: ID of the return request.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Get Returns
apis.description: Retrieves return requests for a specific merchant using the API. Supports filtering by status and provides detailed return information.
apis.query: To filter returns by status send in filter as query param

reqParams.name: filter
reqParams.description: Filter returns by status.

possibleValues.description: Returns that have been approved for processing.
Returns that have been created but not yet processed.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of return request objects.

resParams.name: returnId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the return request.

resParams.name: partnerId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the partner.

resParams.name: merchantName
resParams.description: Name of the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantEmail
resParams.description: Email address of the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantPhone
resParams.description: Phone number of the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantAddressLine1
resParams.description: First line of the merchant's address.

resParams.name: merchantAddressLine2
resParams.description: Second line of the merchant's address.

resParams.name: merchantAddressLine3
resParams.description: Third line of the merchant's address.

resParams.name: merchantCity
resParams.description: City of the merchant's address.

resParams.name: merchantPostalNumber
resParams.description: Postal code of the merchant's address.

resParams.name: merchantCountryCode
resParams.description: Country code of the merchant's address.

resParams.name: deliveryInstruction
resParams.description: Delivery instructions for the return.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the return request.

possibleValues.description: The return request has been approved for processing.
The return request has been created but not yet processed.

resParams.name: returnOrderLines
resParams.description: Array of return order line items.

resParams.name: returnOrderlineId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the return order line.

resParams.name: returnId
resParams.description: ID of the parent return request.

resParams.name: serial
resParams.description: Serial number of the terminal.

resParams.name: terminalId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the terminal.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the merchant.

resParams.name: deviceModel
resParams.description: Model of the device being returned.

resParams.name: reasonForReturn
resParams.description: Reason for the return.

resParams.name: stopBilling
resParams.description: Whether billing has been stopped for this terminal.

resParams.name: comment
resParams.description: Additional comments regarding the return.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

resParams.name: totalCount
resParams.description: Total count of return requests matching the criteria.

apis.heading: Fetch Merchant Orders
apis.description: Retrieves all orders placed for a specific merchant. Use this API to get the status and details of all orders for a particular merchant.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of order objects for the merchant.

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the order.

resParams.name: trackingUrl
resParams.description: The tracking URL of the shipment.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the order.

resParams.name: deliveryPartner
resParams.description: The partner or carrier responsible for delivering the shipment.

resParams.name: packages
resParams.description: Array of package details in the order.

resParams.name: productId
resParams.description: The SurfboardProductId of the product.

resParams.name: serialNumber
resParams.description: Serial number of the device.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
